stream_samples.text: figma canvas frame-rate tanks to ~12fps once our DS file crosses 8 pages on M1 Air. zoom-out is unusable.
Multiplayer cursors stuttering hard at 8+ collaborators in our weekly crit. cursor positions snap by ~400ms.
[#11204 P1] Auto-layout variant nesting drops padding to 0 when 3rd-level child uses fill-container on Chrome 131
Dev Mode CSS pane is showing stale local-variable values for ~30s after a publish. design eng caught it twice today.
Plugin SDK v2: postMessage payloads >256kb silently fail since 04/19. our linter plugin just stops responding.
library publish has been spinning for 14 minutes on a 420mb file. no error, no progress bar movement. classic.
[DESIGN-2098] canvas raster tile cache eviction too aggressive at >6 pages — repeat re-rasterization on pan
FigJam sticky note text input lagging ~500ms behind keystrokes during workshops. people gave up and switched to Miro.
Enterprise SSO loop on Edge 130 — SAML assertion accepted but session cookie not set, redirects back to /login
Comments badge counter stuck on 47 unread for two days. clearing cache fixes it but customers won't do that.
[alert] canvas_paint_p95 above 480ms threshold for 6h on multi-page files >5MB, breach #4 this week
the new Sites template gallery is genuinely lovely. shipping a marketing page in an afternoon.
is anyone else's prototype hotspot drag offset weird since last update? not a blocker just annoying
design-systems team blocked: library publish fails silently on the iOS file (438mb). tried 4 times.

clusters.title: Canvas perf collapse on multi-page files
Dev Mode CSS stale for local variables
Plugin SDK v2 postMessage size regression
Library publish silent fail on >400MB files

top_epic.title: Restore canvas frame-rate to 60fps on multi-page files >5MB
top_epic.rationale: 2,410 signals across X, Reddit, Zendesk and Datadog converge on the same regression: canvas paint p95 has crossed 480ms on multi-page files for six straight hours, and the raster tile cache is evicting too aggressively past 6 pages — every pan retriggers rasterization. Design-system files are the worst hit, and that is exactly the customer cohort Figma cannot afford to frustrate.
top_epic.verdict: Ship-critical — the design-system cohort is the single most strategic customer segment.
top_epic.recommendation: Tune raster tile retention and ship a multi-page perf budget gate before pushing the next canvas renderer change.
acceptance_criteria: Canvas paint p95 < 250ms on files with 8+ pages and 5MB+ assets
Raster tile cache hit-rate above 90% during pan/zoom interactions
60fps sustained on M1 Air at 100% zoom for the top 50 enterprise files
Perf-budget CI gate that fails canvas PRs regressing paint p95 by >5%

evidence.quote: Canvas frame-rate tanks to ~12fps once our DS file crosses 8 pages on M1 Air.
canvas_paint_p95 above 480ms threshold for 6h on multi-page files >5MB.
